memory_recovered: Project status must be modeled as temporal and layered. A committed verifier, deployment gate, or provenance pipeline can coexist with an unresolved deployment or runtime claim without contradiction.
contradictions_resolved: M-001 active versus completed is a temporal supersession, not deletion of the earlier observation.
Cloudflare proof-pipeline implementation versus unproven deployment are different evidence layers and coexist.
Vercel live-identity gate implementation versus unverified iPhone audibility are different evidence layers and coexist.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository files, commit identifiers, and abstract project-state transitions were indexed. Raw chat, health, pet-health, credentials, account identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
limits: The connector did not expose historical queue blobs directly, so the first transition retains the previously indexed blob SHA as provenance rather than re-fetching its content in this run.
No private chat-history material was inspected or published.
